seoTitle: Cape Gloucester vs Cape Hillsborough — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cape Gloucester and Cape Hillsborough. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cape Gloucester vs Cape Hillsborough: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cape Gloucester and Cape Hillsborough.
heading: Cape Gloucester vs Cape Hillsborough — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cape Gloucester, Queensland and Cape Hillsborough, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cape Hillsborough has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Cape Gloucester (30/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cape Gloucester or Cape Hillsborough safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cape Gloucester has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Cape Hillsborough scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cape Gloucester scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Cape Hillsborough scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cape Gloucester or Cape Hillsborough?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cape Hillsborough has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
